class.name: ros2_control_demo_example_18/DuckMiniMujocoSystemInterface
class.description: Hardware interface for Open Duck Mini robot using MuJoCo simulation with contact detection support.

class.name: motion_controller/MotionController
class.description: Controller for full-body motion (legs + head) using ML policy (e.g., ONNX model). Subscribes to sensor data and velocity commands, runs inference, and writes joint positions.
